# Everson Filipe

> Everson Filipe is an Implementation Analyst and AI Automation Developer specializing in scaling B2B onboarding pipelines and robust data integrations. Key highlights include building a JSONLogic-driven dynamic form and rule engine for 42+ B2B clients at Kartado (reducing client setup time from 3 days to under 4 hours), automating Python ETL workflows to replace manual spreadsheet processes (achieving 32% contribution to team output), and developing Python validation notebooks that reduced parameterization analysis times by 40% with zero production syntax failures.

This website provides an interactive multi-language developer portfolio. Below is a curated index of resources and structured resume files optimized for LLMs, AI agents, and search engines.

## Profiles & Contacts

- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/eversonfilipe): Open-source repositories, automation scripts, and DevOps configurations.
- [LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/eversonfilipe-agile-products-ai/): Professional trajectory, career updates, and industry network.
- [Medium Blog](https://eversonfilipe.medium.com/): Articles on technical implementation, scaling SaaS configs, and JSONLogic.
- [Email Address](mailto:eversonfilipe124@gmail.com): Direct contact for project opportunities.

## Resumes & Data (Markdown)

Detailed professional backgrounds, projects, publications, education, and volunteering structured in plain Markdown for language models.

- [English Resume (EN)](https://eversonfilipe.github.io/eversonfilipe-portfolio/docs/data/resume-en.md): Complete curriculum, experiences, projects, stack, and education in English.
- [Portuguese Resume (PT)](https://eversonfilipe.github.io/eversonfilipe-portfolio/docs/data/resume-pt.md): Currículo completo, experiências, projetos e educação em português.
- [Spanish Resume (ES)](https://eversonfilipe.github.io/eversonfilipe-portfolio/docs/data/resume-es.md): Currículum completo, experiencia, proyectos y educación en español.
- [Project Readme](https://github.com/eversonfilipe/eversonfilipe-portfolio/blob/main/README.md): Detailed information about this codebase's stack, design system, and GitOps workflows.

## Optional

- [Design System Guide](https://github.com/eversonfilipe/eversonfilipe-portfolio/blob/main/docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md): Tokens, typography, layout rules, and premium glassmorphism patterns of this website.
